headline: Employers set to rapidly expand AI use in health and benefits, but execution gaps remain, WTW survey finds
summary: Most employers plan to embed AI into benefits operations within two years — yet lack resources, governance and readiness to scale responsiblyNEW YORK, May 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Employers are preparing to significantly expand their use of artificial intelligence (AI) in health and benefits over the next two years, according to a new survey from leading global advisory, broking and solutions company WTW (NASDAQ: WTW).
